source: Synthetic heightmap baseado em parametros reais do terrain
note: Para dados 100% precisos, extraia o arquivo worlds_chernarusplus.pbo usando DayZ Tools e exporte o ASC heightmap via Terrain Builder

terrain_parameters.coordinate_note: In-game X=east-west (0=west), Z=south-north (0=south). Grid row = Z/cell_size, col = X/cell_size

extraction_guide.step1: Instale DayZ Tools via Steam (gratuito para donos do DayZ)
extraction_guide.step2: DayZ Tools Launcher > Tools > Extract Game Data (extrai para P: drive)
extraction_guide.step3: Abra Terrain Builder (incluido no DayZ Tools)
extraction_guide.step4: File > Open Project > navegue ate P:\dz\worlds\chernarusplus\source
extraction_guide.step5: File > Export > Terrain > formato ASC (heightmap bruto)
extraction_guide.step6: O arquivo ASC exportado tera: ncols 2048, nrows 2048, cellsize 7.5, xllcorner 200000
extraction_guide.step7: Use o modulo chernarus_elevation.py com load_from_asc() para carregar dados reais
extraction_guide.alternative: Use Mikero Tools (ExtractPBO) para desempacotar worlds_chernarusplus.pbo e obter o terrain.wrp

heightmap_file_in_pbo: worlds\chernarusplus\data\terrain.wrp (binary) ou exportar via Terrain Builder como ASC
